title: Theatrical: Extra Lights
description: a mod-addon that adds more lights to the Theatrical mod!
body:
This Theatrical mod/addon adds new lights for more variety!

This mod, as the name suggests, adds Extra Lights! Lights that are not included in the official mod.


## ATTENTION! Please note that this mod is an addon for the Theatrical mod, you will need it for it to work.

For now, the mod includes some moving heads, LED panels, lasers, and other types of stage lighting. Additionally, as the Theatrical mod is updated, this mod will be updated as well, so you'll need the latest version of Theatrical if possible.


This mod will add more lights over time. Please note that this takes time and may take a while to add the lights.
Join the Theatrical Discord for more information or if you need help!



![light test stage](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/177b5dae2852e0f469fcfc30fe8b845c739f75c2_0.webp)


![stage demo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/21f9d3d9e6272944196ab716646cd321d43cd760_0.webp)
